items.markdown:
Himalayan salt stone warmers are essential tools for **warm salt stone massage** , designed to heat hand-carved pink salt stones to a therapeutic temperature . These warmers typically use **dry heat** methods—such as LED or halogen bulbs—to protect the integrity of the salt, which can dissolve or roughen if exposed to moisture.[[1]](https://www.massagewarehouse.com/shop-by-brand/harmony-salt/#:~:text=Harmony%20Salt%20Himalayan%20Salt%20Massage%20Stones%2C%20Lamps%20&%20Warmers%20%E2%80%93%20Salt,$79.97)[[2]](https://spabodyworkmarket.com/products/himalayan-salt-poly-carbonate-bowl-massage-stone-warmer-stones#:~:text=Home%20Himalayan%20Salt%20PolyCarbonate%20Bowl,body%20and%20spirit%2C%20into%20balance.)[[3]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:14852904947610286802,catalogid:13805379228972882300,gpcid:4548154486553231692&ibp=oshop)[[4]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:14494578363466482623&ibp=oshop)[[5]](https://purespadirect.com/blogs/pure-spa-direct-blog/himalayan-salt-stone-nature-rsquo-s-answer-to-stress-relief-and-detox-in-massage#:~:text=1.%20Warm%20Them%20%28%20Himalayan%20salt%20stones,moisture%E2%80%94dry%20salt%20stones%20can%20feel%20too%20abrasive.)

Professional-grade models, like those from **Saltability** , often feature eco-friendly polycarbonate bowls or bamboo trays and include timed start-up functions to ensure stones are ready for treatments. For home use, smaller **salt bowl lamps** with massage spheres provide a dual-purpose solution: acting as an air-purifying lamp while gently warming stones for personal muscle relief.[[1]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:14852904947610286802,catalogid:13805379228972882300,gpcid:4548154486553231692&ibp=oshop)[[2]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:16500361316763243954&ibp=oshop)[[3]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:8899823446557652731&ibp=oshop)[[4]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:2818694066367416934&ibp=oshop)[[5]](https://www.leisureopportunities.co.uk/images/dir/831425_901267.pdf)

Are you looking for a **professional-grade** kit for a spa setting, or a smaller **decorative bowl** for personal at-home massage?
